scope: Agent-facing routing index for known MoonCat contract/source surfaces, derived from existing contract data and docs.

notes: Use this file to choose the relevant contract/source surface, then verify exact details in data/contracts.json and the cited sourceRefs.
Full ABI JSON, Solidity source text, bytecode, constructor args, events, storage layout, CIDs, and artifact blobs are not imported here.
Function lists are compact lookup names already documented in data/contracts.json, not complete ABIs.

surfaces.task: Look up original MoonCatRescue contract behavior, rescue-order to bytes5 catId lookup, and source-derived protocol constants.
surfaces.role: Original MoonCatRescue source and deployed mainnet contract.
limitations: The original contract exposes rescue-order to bytes5 catId lookup through the public rescueOrder array.
No direct reverse bytes5 catId to rescue-order on-chain lookup is documented here.
Source and ABI artifacts are linked from data/contracts.json but not imported.

surfaces.task: Check current Acclimated MoonCats token identity and wrapper/token-facing identifier scope.
surfaces.role: ERC-721/ERC-998 acclimated wrapper contract for MoonCats.
limitations: Token ID equals rescue order only within the checked Acclimated MoonCats contract scope documented in existing data.
Older wrapper token ID conventions are not verified here.
Wrapper source, ABI, and marketplace behavior are not duplicated in this index.

surfaces.task: Review exact historical MoonCat wrapper contracts and determine whether wrapper token IDs encode bytes5 cat IDs, use rescue order, or require an explicit lookup.
surfaces.role: Historical unofficial ERC-721 wrapper with mapping-backed WMCR token identifiers.

summary: MoonCatsWrapped accepts bytes5 catId in wrap and maps it to a sequential uint256 wrapper tokenID through _catIDToTokenID and _tokenIDToCatID.
The source has no rescueOrder lookup or conversion, so its wrapper tokenID is not source-confirmed as rescue order or current Acclimated token ID.
A separate bytes5 lookup is required for any API or rescue-order value; other historical wrappers remain outside this exact-contract review.

limitations: No complete inventory of historical or unofficial wrappers is asserted.
No full mapping contents, event history, current chain state, marketplace behavior, or per-token data is imported.
Do not generalize this wrapper's sequential mapping behavior to other wrapper contracts.

surfaces.task: Find the on-chain documentation/reference registry for MoonCat materialization contracts.
surfaces.role: On-chain documentation/reference registry for MoonCat-related contract pages.
limitations: Stored documentation records are not imported.
Write/admin functions are not expanded beyond names already summarized in data/contracts.json.

surfaces.task: Find on-chain trait lookup surface, compact/human-readable trait accessors, and catId/rescue-order helper context.
limitations: No trait mapping table, per-cat trait data, or bit-level derivation is imported.
Use data/trait-index.json for local reference snapshot schema metadata, not on-chain ABI details.
Reverse bytes5 catId to rescue-order lookup is not documented as an on-chain surface here.

surfaces.task: Find color, hue, glow, palette, and accessory-color helper surfaces.
surfaces.role: On-chain MoonCat and accessory color reference/palette-generation contract.

summary: colorsOf returns uint8[24] as 8 RGB triples for glow/original DNA, five MoonCat appearance colors, and two complement colors.
accessoryColorsOf returns uint8[45] as 15 RGB triples derived from colorsOf, including repeated complement colors for accessory palette variants.
paletteOf returns uint8[384] by concatenating the 113-color BasePalette with accessoryColorsOf output.
mapColors stores owner-managed packed overrides for JavaScript/Solidity color edge cases before finalization; override keys/values are not imported.
hueName handles 2000 as white and 1000 as black, then uses ADR-aligned hue buckets.

limitations: No color palette values, BasePalette values, mapColors keys/values, ABI JSON, or full Solidity source is imported.
Detailed compact color semantics live in data/color-hues.json; this file remains a contract surface router.

surfaces.task: Find SVG image-generation surfaces for bytes5 cat IDs or rescue orders.

summary: imageOf(bytes5,bool) consumes MoonCatTraits.kTraitsOf(catId) and MoonCatColors.colorsOf(catId), then assembles an SVG string from svgTag, generated pixel data, and a closing svg tag.
imageOf(bytes5) derives default glow by comparing MoonCatRescue.catOwners(catId) with the stored Acclimated contract address.
rescue-order imageOf overloads require rescueOrder < 25440 and convert through MoonCatRescue.rescueOrder(rescueOrder).
The source exposes public geometry/pattern surfaces such as CatBox, Face, Border, Coat, Tummy, Skin, Whiskers, Eyes, and Patterns, but their values are not imported.
Accessory image composition is not handled by this review; MoonCatAccessoryImages remains a separate surface.

limitations: No SVG coordinate data, pattern arrays, or rendered output is imported.
Detailed compact SVG semantics live in data/mooncat-svg-internals.json; this file remains a contract surface router.
Use API endpoint data separately when routing off-chain image requests.

surfaces.task: Find accessory definition, management, eligibility, sale, rescue-order ownership, wear state, and verification semantics.
surfaces.role: On-chain accessory definitions, management, purchase/assignment, eligibility, and mutable wear-state storage keyed by Acclimated rescue order.

summary: accessoryId is an append-only definition-array index; cat-owned records are separately stored under rescue order.
OwnedAccessory stores accessoryId, paletteIndex, and zIndex; zero zIndex means owned but not worn.
No owned-record transfer, removal, or burn surface exists; definition management is address-based and separate.
MoonCatAccessoryImages consumes ownership and image-data reads and interprets metadata bit 7 as its verification gate.

limitations: No taxonomy, definitions, image bytes, palettes, event history, state, ownership list, or current admin values are imported.
Do not generalize Acclimated rescue-order token authorization to other wrappers.

surfaces.task: Find accessory image composition, accessory PNG, placement, and PNG helper surfaces.
surfaces.role: On-chain MoonCat accessory image composition and PNG helper contract.

summary: accessorizedImageOf accepts numeric rescue-order inputs and composes source-derived base MoonCat pixels with accessory PNG SVG image snippets.
The reviewed source prepares owned accessories, separates foreground/background records, expands the bounding box, and uses distinct glow handling for zero, one, and other glow-level values.
accessoryPNG returns a base64 PNG data URI; exact accessory data, palette values, PNG bytes, current state, and rendered output remain unimported.

limitations: No accessory ID taxonomy, placement table, palette values, PNG bytes, accessory image data, current state, or rendered output is imported.
Detailed compact semantics live in data/mooncat-accessory-images-internals.json; this file remains a contract surface router.
MoonCatAccessories definition and ownership lifecycle is reviewed separately; current accessory state remains outside both reviews.

surfaces.task: Choose which materialization helper contract to inspect before deeper internals work.
surfaces.role: Official on-chain materialization support surfaces linked from the MoonCatRescue Chained to the Future log and represented in data/contracts.json.
limitations: This is a routing grouping only; it does not imply identical interfaces across all contracts.
Detailed internals, storage, and output data require a focused review of the cited sourceRefs.
This file is a compact routing index, not canonical contract data; canonical address records remain in data/contracts.json.
No full ABI JSON, Solidity source text, bytecode, constructor args, events, storage layout, CIDs, or contract artifacts are imported.
No new contract addresses or unregistered sourceRefs are introduced.
Function names are limited to names already summarized in data/contracts.json and docs/contracts.md.
Check data/sources.json and sourceRefs before relying on non-obvious contract claims.
todos: If agents need exact call signatures, add a separate ABI policy or artifact index instead of expanding this routing file.
Review materialization internals in focused passes before importing trait derivation, color palette, SVG coordinate, or accessory image data.
Verify accessory contract scope separately before adding any additional accessory-related contract surfaces.
